verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Casting out all fears and doubts He'll surely bring you out Of your condition Whatever it may be Staying in His provided way A great price for us He paid Only in that place You'll enter into rapturing grace

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For He has given me the faith to believe For whatever I ask I shall receive He's given me the key for my victory Believing on Him who's been sent to me Through this five fold ministry I need not worry My soul is now at peace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For He has given me the faith to believe For whatever I ask I shall receive He told me come boldly before His throne For I am His own Believing what He said concerning me Brings to my heart a settled peace I need not worry My soul is now at peace
